positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a stylized mountain range silhouette at sunset. The scene features sharp, geometric peaks and clean, interlocking geological forms. Incorporate a crescent moon and a few scattered stars within the negative space. The overall design should use only deep indigo, burnt orange, and cream tones for maximum contrast. The style must be clean, bold, and suitable for direct print application on fabric, emphasizing strong outlines and negative space. Central, symmetrical composition. High contrast, vector quality, graphic design aesthetic.
